hooks.command: python -c "import sys, json, subprocess; data = json.load(sys.stdin); fp = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', ''); fp.endswith('.java') and subprocess.run('mvn compile test -q', shell=True, cwd='C:/sandbox/PersonalTradeAssistant/PersonalTradeAssistant')" 2>&1

python -c "import sys, json; data = json.load(sys.stdin); fp = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', ''); eng = '/engine/' in fp.replace('\\', '/') and fp.endswith('.java'); eng and print('REMINDER: Engine code changed — run /sync-docs to update requirements.md, features.md, and CLAUDE.md')" 2>&1
